title: AIIMS Patna Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 60 Senior Resident Posts
description: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Patna (AIIMS Patna) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 60 Senior Resident Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the Post Graduation, MD/ MS, DNB, and MBBS can grab this chance and apply for the AIIMS Patna Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can attend t...
